summary: PowerShell module logic is sound but lacks Set-StrictMode and try-catch for JSON parsing. Workflow uses shell: pwsh correctly but has no error handling on PowerShell steps. Test harness (run-tests.sh) uses proper set -euo pipefail but repeats validation logic 20+ times (grep checks for DELETE_COUNT, RETAINED, DELETED per fixture, lines 75–132) — should factor into a helper function. Missing fixture JSON files prevents full validation. Script files themselves are readable with good naming, but defensive programming is weak.
